readme.required_heading: ## How it fits into Atlas Systems

pull_request_labels.name: status:blocked
pull_request_labels.description: Progress is blocked by a concrete dependency or failure.

pull_request_labels.name: status:live-verified
pull_request_labels.description: Live state has been independently or owner-verified after rollout.

pull_request_labels.name: status:owner-review
pull_request_labels.description: Implementation is ready for Atlas owner review.

pull_request_labels.name: status:rollout-pending
pull_request_labels.description: Source is merged or approved; live rollout is still pending.

pull_request_labels.name: status:superseded
pull_request_labels.description: Work was replaced by a newer change and should not be merged.
